tool.name: Reduction

param.name: config_json
param.label: JSON Configuration
param.help: A JSON file with run parameters including input_file, template_file, data_directory, and output_directory. Overrides the individual parameters above when provided.

tool.command: #if $config_json export EVENT_FILE=\$(python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$config_json')); print(d['event_file'])") && export TEMPLATE=\$(python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$config_json')); print(d.get('template_file', ''))") && export DATA_DIR=\$(python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$config_json')); print(d.get('data_directory', '$data_dir'))") && export OUTPUT_DIR=\$(python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('$config_json')); print(d.get('output_directory', '$output_dir'))") && #else export EVENT_FILE='$input_file' && export TEMPLATE='$template_file' && export DATA_DIR='$data_dir' && export OUTPUT_DIR='$output_dir' && #end if ln -s \$OUTPUT_DIR output && export HOME=/root && ln -s \$DATA_DIR /app/data && echo "running reduction..." && pixi run --as-is --manifest-path /app python /app/scripts/mantid/simple_reduction.py --event-file \$EVENT_FILE --template \$TEMPLATE --output-dir output > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2) && cat output/.last_reduced_set > $identifier && cat output/reflectivity.txt > $reflectivity
